languages.text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Надзирателями могут стать не только Офицеры и Оперативники, но и персонажи с бекграундами Арбайтесов и Псайкеров (как санкционированные так и не санкционированные). Особенности и тактика Надзирателя напрямую зависят от выбранного фамильяра.

languages.text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Offices and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned) can become Overseers whose tactics and capabilities are determined by the selected familiar.
Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected of familiar.
Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

languages.text: Офицеры и оперативники, а также арбитры и псайкеры (как санкционированные, так и нет) могут стать надзирателями. Их тактика и возможности в бою определяются выбором фамильяра.
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Офицеры и оперативники, а также арбитры и псайкеры (как санкционированные, так и нет) могут стать надзирателями. Их тактика и возможности в бою определяются выбором фамильяра.
Офицеры и оперативники, а также арбитры и псайкеры (как санкционированные, так и нет) могут стать надзирателями. Их тактика и возможности в бою определяются выбором фамильяра.

languages.text: Offiziere, Agenten, Arbitratoren und (sanktionierte wie unsanktionierte) Psioniker können Aufseher werden. Ihre Taktiken und Fähigkeiten werden durch den gewählten Vertrauten bestimmt.
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Offiziere, Agenten, Arbitratoren und (sanktionierte wie unsanktionierte) Psioniker können Aufseher werden. Ihre Taktiken und Fähigkeiten werden durch den gewählten Vertrauten bestimmt.

languages.text: Les officiers et les agents, mais aussi les arbitrators et les psykers (assermentés ou non), peuvent devenir surveillants. Leurs tactiques et capacités dépendent du familier sélectionné.
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Les officiers et les agents, mais aussi les arbitrators et les psykers (assermentés ou non), peuvent devenir surveillants. Leurs tactiques et capacités dépendent du familier sélectionné.

languages.text: 军官、特工、法务官、灵能者（包括合法灵能者与非法灵能者）都可以转职为监察官，监察官的能力与战术风格取决于他们选择的使仆。
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: 军官、特工、法务官、灵能者（包括合法灵能者与非法灵能者）都可以转职为监察官，监察官的能力与战术风格取决于他们选择的使仆。

languages.text: Los oficiales y agentes, así como los Arbitrator y los psíquicos (autorizados o no), pueden convertirse en supervisores. Sus tácticas y capacidades dependen del familiar que elijan.
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: Los oficiales y agentes, así como los Arbitrator y los psíquicos (autorizados o no), pueden convertirse en supervisores. Sus tácticas y capacidades dependen del familiar que elijan.

languages.text: 士官やオペレーターだけでなく、アービトレイターや異能者（公認、非公認の両方）も監督官になることができる。その戦略および能力は、選択されたファミリアーによって決定する。
languages.original_text: Officers and Operatives, but also Arbitrators and psykers (both sanctioned and unsanctioned), can become Overseers. Their tactics and capabilities are determined by their selected familiar.

traits.locale_text: 士官やオペレーターだけでなく、アービトレイターや異能者（公認、非公認の両方）も監督官になることができる。その戦略および能力は、選択されたファミリアーによって決定する。

languages.text: Subay ve Ajanların yanı sıra Yargıcı ve ruhsezerler de (hem onaylı hem de onaysız) Gözetmen'e dönüşebilirler. Kullanabileceği taktikler ile hünerleri, seçtiği iyeye göre değişir.
